word: H8564 - תַּמְרוּר - tamrûwr - tam-roor' - High heap

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּמרוּר

Transliteration: tamrûr

Phonetic: tam-roor'

BDB Definition:

  1. guideposts, markers, signposts, high heap
    1. meaning doubtful

Origin: from the same root as H8558

TWOT entry: 2523e

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
